lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Jatziri, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Nilsal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mumpty Rumpty fell off a wall!

lines.speaker: Jatziri, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The egg that was living at the top of the temple!

lines.speaker: Jatziri, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Yes, I noticed the tourist had an egg with him... I didn't realise it had a name...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: We need to do something!

lines.speaker: Jatziri, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Well... it's an egg, iknami. If it's broken, then there isn't much you can do about that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not giving up without at least trying first.

lines.speaker: Jatziri, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: I see... Well, I don't think I can help you, iknami, but good luck.

sections.title: Talking to the nearby farmer or citizen

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. I don't suppose you could help me?

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Nilsal. What is it you need help with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This might sound a little strange... but Rumpty Bumpty fell off a wall.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Lumpty Mumpty?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, exactly!

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Who's that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He's an egg. I need to get him fixed up.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: You want to put a broken egg back together again?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Precisely! Can you help me?

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: I don't think I can... but I might know of somebody who could help. You should speak to the local bartender. Her resourcefulness has earned her quite the reputation. Everyone calls her King.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: King? Okay, I'll try and find her. Thanks!

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Good luck, iknami.

sections.title: Talking to the King, the bartender

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: Welcome, iknami. What can I get you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you the king?

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: The king? No, no, you won't be finding anybody like that around these parts!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, what I meant was... are you King?

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: Oh! That's me, yes. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's about Pumpty Lumpty.

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: Scrumpty Lumpy?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, yes, the egg. He fell off a wall.

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: An egg fell off a wall?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It was a disaster! He's everywhere! I was told that if anybody could help put him together again, it would be you.

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: Yes, I guess I have managed to gain a bit of a reputation when it comes to situations like this. After all, there's a reason everyone calls me King.

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: Still, putting a broken egg back together again... That does sound like quite the challenge. Unfortunately, I'm afraid I need to stay here and man the bar. However...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: I have a plan, but it's going to take all my horses and all my men.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's a horse?

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: I have no idea.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... Well, what about these men?

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: They'll be up to the task, but you'll need to rally them up.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, where can I find your men?

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: Nezketi should be in the temple just south of here, Kauayotl will most likely be just outside the main entrance into town, and Acatzin is right here in the inn.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks! I'll have them gathered in no time.

sections.title: Talking to King first without talking to anyone else

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Scrumpty Numpty fell off a wall!

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: Bumpty Numpty?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, exactly!

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: Who's that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He's an egg. I need to get him fixed up.

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: An egg fell off a wall?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It was a disaster! He's everywhere! Can you help?

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: I think you came to the right person. I've managed to gain a bit of a reputation when it comes to situations like this. There's a reason everyone calls me King.

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: Still putting a broken egg back together again... That does sound like quite the challenge. Unfortunately, I'm afraid I need to stay here and man the bar. However...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: I have a plan, but it's going to take all my horses and all my men.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's a horse?

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: I have no idea.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... Well, what about these men.

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: They'll be up to the task, but you'll need to rally them up.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, where can I find your men?

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: Nezketi should be in the temple just south of here, Kauayotl will most likely be just outside the main entrance into town, and Acatzin is right here in the inn.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks! I'll have them gathered in no time.

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: Welcome back, iknami. What can I get you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, where can I find your men?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This isn't good. I'd better head into town and try to find some help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. What are you doing out here?

lines.speaker: Alan
lines.text: You found me! What a day, huh, Humpy Plumpy?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right... Is everything okay?

lines.speaker: Alan
lines.text: Yes, yes... In fact, I've been getting rather used to life out here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see... So, who are you, and how did you end up here?

lines.speaker: Alan
lines.text: Oh, I'm Alan. I was just visiting the area as a tourist, but I ended up straying from the pack a little.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you need a hand getting back to civilization? I could maybe help you out if so.

lines.speaker: Alan
lines.text: Oh, no thank you. Like I say, I've actually come to quite like it here. Had I never got lost, I might never have met my best friend, Numpty Bumpty.

lines.speaker: Alan
lines.text: Still, it is nice for us to finally have a guest. In fact, you should stay for a while! I'll prepare a little feast for us all! What do you say?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I suppose I can't say no to that.

lines.speaker: Alan
lines.text: Wonderful! Would you mind staying here while I go out and gather the food? I may not have known you long, but I'm sure I can trust you to keep an eye on Wumty Scrumpty over there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Alan
lines.text: Right, time for me to get going. Don't worry, Hampty, our new friend here is going to take good care of you while I'm gone. Love you lots. Miss you already.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there, egg.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bollocks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got something else to do first.

lines.speaker: Alan
lines.text: Okay, I'll wait until you return. Just don't go getting lost out there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you for the offer, but I really must get going... Maybe another time.

sections.title: Talking to Acatzin after refusing to talk to the blacksmith

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need your help with Wumty Scrumpty.

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: Lumpty Mumpty?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, yes. Egg, fell off a wall, disaster.

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: Oh, that's right. Well, if you can get me my axe back...

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: How are you getting on with my axe?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm still working on it.

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: Well, good luck getting a word in with that blacksmith!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me... Are you one of King's men?

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: Why do you ask?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: King said that you might be able to help me. It's about Rumpty Bumpty.

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: Gumty Fumty?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, Pumpty Lumpty fell off a wall! It's a disaster.

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: A man fell off a wall? How tall is this wall?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well... not exactly a man. He's an egg.

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: I see... Well, I can probably help once I can get out of here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: When will that be?

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: As soon as I get my axe back. It's with the blacksmith, but he seems too busy to even talk to me. Think you can help get it back?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can talk to the blacksmith.

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: Perfect! You'll find him in the western part of town, not far from here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll be back soon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There's no time for this!

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: Well, in that case, I think you'll need to help your egg without me.

sections.title: Talking to the blacksmith again before repairing the whetstone

lines.speaker: Blacksmith
lines.text: Is that whetstone fixed?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Blacksmith
lines.text: Too slow! We need to speed things up! Let's come together and fix this whetstone!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay...

sections.title: Talking to the blacksmith after repairing the whetstone

lines.speaker: Blacksmith
lines.text: Is that whetstone fixed?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's done. Now, about that axe...

lines.speaker: Blacksmith
lines.text: Axe? I don't have your axe. Are you sure you gave it to me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's not my axe, it's...

lines.speaker: Blacksmith
lines.text: Actually, here, have this one. It's broken, but you can use my newly fixed whetstone to sort that out.

sections.title: Talking to Acatzin after receiving the axe

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: How are you getting on with my axe?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Turned out there was a bit of a backlog of work... The whetstone had some problems as well, but that's all fixed up now.

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: So, have you got it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have, but it still needs a little work...

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: Well, once it's finished, we can see about sorting out Wumty Scrumpty.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have it right here!

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: Perfect! Hand it over, and then we'll see about Lumpty Mumpty.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Rumpty Bumpty.

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: Yeah, that's it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, here's the axe. When you're ready, head over to the big temple just north of town.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there! Are you...

lines.speaker: Blacksmith
lines.text: Blacksmith! Yes, I'm the blacksmith!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great! I'm here about...

lines.speaker: Blacksmith
lines.text: I'm very busy, so you'll need to be quick! What do you need?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'm here about an axe...

lines.speaker: Blacksmith
lines.text: Sorry, I don't sell those! Move along!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't want to buy one! I'm here to pick up one that you're repairing.

lines.speaker: Blacksmith
lines.text: Okay, yes, I can repair an axe for you. It won't be quick though as I have a lot of other work to get through first.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The axe is already here. I'm just here to pick it up.

lines.speaker: Blacksmith
lines.text: Well, you can't. No repairs are getting done until the whetstone is fixed!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, what's wrong with the whetstone?

lines.speaker: Blacksmith
lines.text: Yes, the whetstone! Are you going to get it fixed or are you just going to keep standing around like that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay... I guess I can try and fix the whetstone.

sections.title: Talking to Nezketi after refusing to give him tea

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need your help with Pumpty Lumpty.

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Scrumpty Lumpy?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, the egg I was telling you about before...

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Ah, I remember. Unfortunately, I still don't think I'll be much help until I've had my tea...

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: How are you getting on with that tea?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm working on it.

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Remember, you want leaves from damiana shrubs. I know of some just on the other side of the eastern wall. I assume you know what to do once you have them?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I get a cup for it?

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Of course, if you have the space to carry it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yeah... I'll be right back.

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Now, I trust you know how to make tea?

sections.title: Talking to Nezketi with brewed tea

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Is that tea I smell?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Kuani! Would you mind putting it in a cup for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure thing.

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Is that tea I smell?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Hmm... doesn't smell much like my usual tea...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, no of course not.

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Remember, you want leaves from damiana shrubs. I know of some just on the other side of the eastern wall.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got your tea!

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Wonderful. I'll just have that, then we can get to work on this Humphrey Dumphrey.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You mean Gumty Fumty?

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: That's what I said. Where is he?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: In the big temple just north of town.

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Okay, I'll meet you over there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me... Are you one of King's men?

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: I might be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need your help. It's Bumpty Numpty.

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Humphrey Dumphrey?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes. He's a broken egg. We need to try and put him back together!

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: This isn't good!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, can you help?

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: I think I can, but I'm going to need to be on top of my game for a job like this. In other words, I'm going to need some tea.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can get you some tea.

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Kuani! There are plenty of damiana shrubs around here. I know of some just on the other side of the eastern wall. They make for the best tea. I like mine without any milk.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You'll have to just give me a moment to make some space for it.

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Now, I trust you know how to make tea?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you remind me?

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: You'll need to take the damiana leaves and add them to a bowl of water. You then need to boil the water before transferring the tea into a cup.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright, I'll be back soon with some tea.

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Thank you, iknami.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Very good, iknami. In that case, I'll be here once you have some tea for me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Now's not the time for tea!

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Well, I don't think I'll be much use without it...

sections.title: Talking to Kauayotl again after refusing to help

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need your help with Wumty Scrumpty.

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: As I said, my friend, this is a matter that's very personal to me. However, I first need to finish sorting out my racing cart.

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: Hello again. How's the cart coming along?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm still working on it.

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: It should just need a couple of planks and some nails. I'm sure you can find some around here somewhere. Oh, and don't forget your hammer and saw!

sections.title: Talking to Kauayotl after fixing the cart

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, that's the cart all fixed.

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: Kuani! It's looking great! All it needs now is a nice new red racing stripe. That's one for later though. For now, let's sort out this problem of yours. Where do you need me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Over in the big temple just north of town.

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: I will go there at once.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me... Are you one of King's men?

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: I sure am. What do you need?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got a very big problem. It's Bumpty Numpty.

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: Gumty Fumty?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes. He was sat on a wall, but he had a great fall!

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: Tell me you're joking?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid not. Do you think you can help?

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: My friend, this is a matter that's very personal to me. I once lost a good friend under similar horrific circumstances. However, I first need to finish sorting out my racing cart.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Racing cart?

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: That's right! We race them over in the Colosseum. Mine took quite a bit of damage last time so I need to get that sorted.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Well, maybe I can help out with that?

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: That would be appreciated. I reckon a couple of planks and some nails should be all you need to get it fixed. I'm sure you can find some around here somewhere. Oh, and don't forget your hammer and saw!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: We have bigger problems right now!

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: My friend, I know your plight, but the cart must be sorted before I can do anything else. I'm sorry.

sections.title: Talking to King after gathering all her men
Talking to any of King's men at the temple

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, how are we looking?

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: This isn't good, iknami. We don't think there's any way we can put this egg back together again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are we going to do?

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: The way I see it, we only have one option. We need to replace the egg.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Replace Pumpty Lumpty? That's madness!

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: It's more than madness. There isn't even a word to properly describe what it is. However, I fear it is the only path available to us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But where would we even get a replacement egg?

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: We're going to need to obtain a chicken egg.

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Tetamo! That's preposterous! A chicken egg is far too small.

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: Not if it's from a rather large chicken.

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: A dragon egg is what we need. They are the perfect size.

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: A dragon egg would be suicide. No dragon would willingly give up its egg. What we need is a jaguar egg.

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: But jaguars don't lay eggs...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How about we gather a few potential eggs and pick the best one?

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: Kuani! What a brilliant idea.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I just need to know where I can find these eggs.

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: There are some dragons in a cave just south east of here, across the river from Tal Teklan. One of them should have an egg.

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: There's a chicken farm on the outskirts of Tal Teklan. I reckon you'll be able to find a large chicken egg there.

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: And I've heard talk of some eggs in an old camp site by the mine east of Tal Teklan. Apparently the camp site is a hot spot for jaguars! They must be jaguar eggs!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right then. I'll be back once I have some eggs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Remind me, where can I find a dragon egg?

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: There are some dragons in a cave just south east of here, across the river from Tal Teklan. One of them should have a suitable egg.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll head over there and try to find one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Remind me, where can I find a large chicken egg?

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: There's a farm on the outskirts of Tal Teklan. I reckon you'll be able to find one there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll head over there then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Remind me, where can I find a jaguar egg?

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: I've heard talk of some in an old camp site by the mine east of Tal Teklan.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll have a look and see if I can find them.

sections.title: Interacting with the pile of eggs

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: Welcome back, iknami. What can I get you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've gathered your men.

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: Then I've done all I can. The rest is now in their hands, and yours. Good luck, iknami.

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: The chicken egg is ready to be judged. You should get the other eggs gathered.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I managed to find a large chicken egg!

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: Good work! I'll get it set up so its ready to be judged.

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: The dragon egg is ready to be judged. You should get the other eggs gathered.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I managed to find a dragon egg!

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: Kuani! Excellent work! I'll get it ready to go.

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: The jaguar egg is all set up and ready to be judged. You should work on gathering the other eggs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm on it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have that jaguar egg!

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Kuani! I'll get it set up and ready to be judged.

sections.title: After placing all of the eggs to be judged

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: That's the last one. Let's get these eggs judged.

sections.title: Talking to any of King's men before putting Humphrey Dumphrey back together

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's fix this egg!

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: It's beautiful!

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: Indeed it is. I think this means our work here is done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you. I don't think I could have done it without you three.

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: Don't mention it. We're happy to have helped. Now, we should leave you to it.

lines.speaker: Alan
lines.text: I'm back! How was Plumper? He didn't cause you any problems, did he?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... No. No problems at all.

lines.speaker: Alan
lines.text: Wonderful! I'm so glad to hear it. Now, I've got quite the meal lined up for us. Would you mind giving me a hand bringing everything inside?

lines.speaker: Alan
lines.text: You know, friend, it wasn't until now that I came to realise that I'd actually been lost for a long time. I had a job back home... I had a family... and yet, something was missing.

lines.speaker: Alan
lines.text: But now... now I think I've finally found myself. For the first time in my life, I know who I am... who I'm meant to be. I think this can be a proper home. A home for me, and for Rumpy as well. A forever home.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bollocks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, we have the eggs.

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: We've prettied them up as best we can. Hopefully one of them looks like Scrumpty Lumpy.

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: First up, the chicken egg.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... It's not bad, but I think it's just a little bit too small to be Humpty Fumty.

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: Well, what about the dragon egg?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's a good size, but the face... it seems to be melting off. I think the egg is too warm.

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: The jaguar egg then? It's a perfect size and it's the right temperature.

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: I still don't think it's actually a jaguar egg...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, regardless of what it is, I do think it might be the one.

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Kuani! Good work everyone. I think we've done it!

lines.speaker: King's men and the Player
lines.text: Bollocks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are we going to do now?

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: We gave it our best, but I fear we have failed.

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: We can't give up!

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: There's only one thing for it. We're going to have to put Pumpty Lumpty back together again.

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: But how? He was broken beyond repair!

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: We don't have any other options. We have to try.

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: But it's not possible!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, it's necessary...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. Thanks again for helping with Mumpty Rumpty.

lines.speaker: Nezketi
lines.text: Don't mention it, iknami. Always happy to be of service.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. Thanks again for helping with Rumpty Bumpty.

lines.speaker: Acatzin
lines.text: Always happy to help, iknami.

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: Welcome back, iknami. I hear you managed to solve your egg problem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I did. Your men were a big help.

lines.speaker: King
lines.text: Glad to hear it. Now, what can I get you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. Thanks again for helping with Mumpty Rumpty.

lines.speaker: Kauayotl
lines.text: It was my pleasure, iknami. We of course wouldn't have been able to do it without you either.
